cooperates.cooperate_desc: Julian with tigreal combo is great tigreal can pull all the enemies together whilst julian can do massive aoe with his 2-3-1 combo.

counters.counter_desc: Valir along with great poke heroes excells at annoying Julian mains as these heroes can safely slow and damage him at a safe distance and when he manages to get close they either dash out or push you back

dominants.dominant_desc: In the laning phase julian excells at playing safely or aggresively with his passive and first skill he can either safely poke or last hit enemy minions, Always leave your enhanced second skill when clearing or pushing for a clear way out, ALWAYS HELP WITH THE FIRST TURTLE this ensures resources for you and your teamate, Rotate if you can dont let your lane opponent push your turret clear fast and help your team if your lane opponent stays in the lane make sure to return quickly.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Picking the marksmen emblem is great with providing additional lifesteal and attack speed
for the talents pick SWIFT in the first slot for additional attack speed
Festival of blood for the second slot for more spellvamp
And for the third slot Pick war cry, War cry fits perfectly in with Julians passive.
emblems.emblem_title: Marksman emblem with lifesteal and basic attacks

equips.equip_desc: Julians build should always consists of FEATHER OF HEAVEN and CONCENTRATED ENERGY as these items are his main source of spellvamp and attack speed, after getting this two items it is important for you to get WINDTALKER as it synchronizes with the emblems perfectly, the kast 2 slots should be sustain items as going full damage could let hin be bursted down too fast.

hero.hero_overview: Julian is a very versatile hero with a combination of Immunity lifesteal damage and control, He offers great laning the ability to snowball extremely fast and comebacks during clashes.
hero.hero_strength: Julians Strengths Consists of him being able to burst down squishy heroes out-sustain other fighters and tanks eith his Enhanced second skill and able to deal damage whilst being immune
hero.hero_weakness: Julians Weakness Consists of him being vulnurable to burst heroes such as eudora and saber as if he doesnt burst them down first they will, hes also very vulnurable while his skills are on cooldown providing no sustain except for his equipment emblems battle spells and positioning.

spell.spell_desc: Julian being locked down is very dangerous especially with multiple enemy heroes, to survive this he either needs to escape the lockdown or survive it which is why Flicker or vengeance are the best options you can also pick purify but picking it so may lower your damage or mobility by picking it instead of flicker or vengeance tho it gives you the ability to escape lockdowns and do a great comeback by using your enhanced second skill, For damage inspire is always the best but makes you very vulnurable to burst without any tank build or sustain build.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: You could just damage his combo if you fully mastered Julian with he's untargetable 2 enhance skill

counters.counter_desc: U could just dodge his ult so ling will be have a hard time dealing with julian

dominants.dominant_desc: Julian are good for surprising enemy squishy with he's combo of enhance first skill and 1v1ing enemy but be cautious of using skill Julian still vulnerable for burst enemy and hard crowd control

emblems.emblem_desc: You can also use fighter emblem or assassin emblem but this is I recommend because of the +penetration and cool down reduction and partner it with rupture and seasoned hunter for fast farming and war cry for instant burst and high damage for 6 seconds

equips.equip_desc: For high bursting and fast farm and more likely overkill for marksman in basic attack in late game due to high damage skill with immune or crowd control  but you could change build depends on the hero of enemy and gameplay

It's op for sustaining damage if enemy have less crowd control and anti lifesteal because not many all buy it like they didn't know anti heal exist so it's good for that enemy but this build are kinda risky due to lack of skill damage and weak for burst enemy

Good for sustaining if your team have damage roam like helcurt saber kadita etc but it's kinda useless for bursting enemy and 1v1ing enemy dues to lack of damage only sustain and medium damage but it's still op for teamfight

hero.hero_overview: Julian can be mid lane exp lane and jungler he is good for 1v1 the enemy and could easily burst squishy hero you need to master his skill enhance to be very vulnerable in teamfight
hero.hero_strength: Julian is strong at poking outplaying hero and bursting and he's fast to clear waves jungles creeps and buffs and could solo  elemental lord and turtle with a right build
hero.hero_weakness: He's weakness is high sustain hero with damage and burst hero like kadita and etc and he's kinda useless for teamfight due to lack of sustainability

hero.hero_overview:
🧬 Basic Info

Name: Julian
Title: Scarlet Raven
Role: Mage / Assassin (hybrid)
Difficulty: Hard (combo-based hero)
Faction: Forsaken Light (with Yin, Melissa, Xavier)

Julian is one of the most unique heroes in MLBB because:

❌ He does not have a traditional ultimate
✅ Instead, his skills become enhanced through combos
hero.hero_strength: High burst damage, strong early game, flexible in jungle/mid/EXP, and no ultimate cooldown thanks to enhanced skills.
hero.hero_weakness: Combo-dependent, squishy if caught, weak during skill cooldowns, and easily countered by heavy crowd control.

data.recommend: Use Vengeance when facing high burst or multiple enemies. It is best for fighters, tanks, and heroes who stay in close combat, as it reduces damage taken and reflects damage back during teamfights.

spell.spell_desc: For a short duration, the hero takes reduced damage and reflects a portion of the damage received back to nearby enemies as magic damage.

data.title: ******* son

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kalae and Jullian can pick off target easily and burst them down.

counters.counter_desc: Very good counter

equips.equip_desc: Build focused on magic damage burst from combo and enhanced passive.

hero.hero_overview: Jullian is an underrated hero in the game in my opinion. He deals magic damage through the combination of enchnached skill and basic attacks which can deal some serious amount of damages.
hero.hero_strength:
Jullian has very good farming ability due to this low cooldown skills and enhanced basic attacks from his passive. He can sustain very well in fights due to this passive hybrid life steal.
He has Damage, Invulnerability and Crowd Control al in one .
hero.hero_weakness: Jullian is weak before level 3 and easy to kill with high burst dmz damage. Heroes like saber and chou can lock him down easily.

spell.spell_desc: As going jungle, this spell is compulsory as it gives more creeps rewards and damage reduction from creeps.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: To choose a good roamer, you only need one criterion: long-term control. Control of Grock or Guinevere is ideal.

counters.counter_desc: Heroes with long or constant dashes have an advantage over us because we can't hit with abilities and they can quickly close the gap. The worst heroes to play against are Harith, Joy, Lancelot, Lee Sun Sin, and Marcel due to his crowd control.

dominants.dominant_desc: Tips for players. The first tip is to avoid fighting without a head. During a fight, you should always think two steps ahead and use counters. The second tip is to farm to avoid becoming dependent on kills. Buy a Genius Wand and then engage in combat. This will make it easier for you later and easier to kill early. Don't go for the turtles. I'm talking about the first turtle here. If your opponents have a much stronger pick at the start, take their buff instead. You'll be pleased with it, but the buff + money will be a disadvantage to them.
dominants.dominant_title: How not to lose at the start

emblems.emblem_desc:
I take Agility to quickly take my forest and hit enemies faster. Experienced Hunter for faster forest farming. I take Deadly Ignition to finish off enemies if they flee.
проворность беру что быстрее забирать свой лес и бить быстрее врагов. опытный охотник для более быстрого фарма леса. смертельное воспламенение беру для того что бы добивать врагов если сбегают

equips.equip_desc:
The build will vary slightly depending on the situation, but it's roughly the same. After buying the boots, buy a knife. It's still too early for GW, so first, buy a Genius Wand. If all goes well, buy a Crystal, but if not, use Queen's Wings instead. The third is Concentrated Energy for Vampirism. Now, upgrade the knife to GW if there are few tanks, or to a Feather if there are many tanks, and 5 items always have penetration. Instead of a Genius Wand, buy Immortality or a Crown.
билд будет немного меняться в зависимости от ситуации но примерно такой. после покупка ботинка покупайте нож, еще рано для гсв поэтому сначала покупаем палку гения. если все хорошо то покупаем кристал но если не очень вместо кристала крылья королевы. третий концентрированая энергия для вампиризма, только сейчас мы улучшаем нож до гсв если мало танков или до перо если много танков и 5 предметов всегда пробитие. вместо палочки гения покупаем бессмертие или корону

hero.hero_overview:
Джулиан - очень сильный герой как для новичков так и в руках опытных игроков. Тут я постараюсь объяснить всё у данного героя
(Julian is a very strong hero for both beginners and experienced players. Here I'll try to explain everything about this hero.)
hero.hero_strength:
У героя есть много сильных сторон. одна из таких это то что ему не нужен 4 уровень, очень быстро фармить в лесу, также обладает сильным разрушительным уроном. очень много урона на старте и в лейте
The hero has many strengths. One of them is that he doesn't need level 4, he farms very quickly in the jungle, and he also has very strong destructive damage, dealing a lot of damage early and in the late game.
hero.hero_weakness:
у героя есть слабые стороны, начну с самых опасных. первое до 3 героя он является грушей для битья, поэтому старается избегать драк и защищаете свой лес. вторая проблема он герой перефарма и многие когда играют на нем идут убивать пытаться убивать людей на старте и умирают из-за этого. третий у героя на старте долгие кл кнопок. и четверое и самое тяжёлое для него, как и для всех, это контроль ваша задача избегать любого контроля или микро оглушение
The hero has some weaknesses, I'll start with the most dangerous ones. First, up until Hero 3, he's a punching bag, so he tries to avoid fights and protect his jungle. The second problem is that he's an overfarming hero, and many people who play him go for kills at the start and die because of it. Third, the hero has long key presses at the start. And the fourth and hardest thing for him, like everyone else, is crowd control; your job is to avoid any crowd control or micro stuns.

spell.spell_desc: I take Smite for quick forest clearing. The most important thing is not to save it. As soon as you cast 2, 3, or 1, immediately give it away. Most importantly, don't use Smite 1-3-2 on an objective; there's a 78% chance you'll lose the objective because of it, since Smite damage only occurs when the enhanced 2nd skill finishes.(смайт беру для быстрой зачистки леса. самое важное не экономить его. как только вы делаете прокаст 2,3,1 сразу отдавайте смайт. самое важное не используйте прокасть 1-3-2 смайт на объекте, 78% шанс что вы из-за этого потеряли объект, так как урон смайта будет только когда усиленный 2 навык будет завершаться)

dominants.dominant_desc: Tip in early is to farm fast and get kills but if you're behind u should just farm to avoid getting feed. Tip in mid is to eliminate/kill dmg dealers and in the late game you'll mostly get all of your items so target the enemy back lines hide in the bushes to make a suprise attack this is very good for the team because it eliminates dmg dealers and makes the enemy team a disadvantage.

emblems.emblem_desc: I use swift for faster basic attacks, Seasoned Hunter for faster jungling clear and war cry for that extra 8% dmg when U hit an enemy hero with skills/basic attacks 3 times.

equips.equip_desc: Julian basically has a inbuilt sustain in his kit, it's because his passive gives him 15%+ hybrid Lifesteal per skill hit (upto 45% hybrid Lifesteal) so Julian doesn't need sustain items. The calculation for the healing of Lifesteal is (Total DMG) × (Lifesteal/spellvamp) = (HP Recovered) so going full damage makes Julian a Lifesteal god.

hero.hero_overview: Julian is a quite versatile hero I use him on EXP/JUNGLE/MID and sometimes Gold lane, but I mostly use him on Jungle because he can get his items faster. By the time I was making this guide I'm a 400 matches Julian.
hero.hero_strength: His early game level 3 has a significant advantage because he can combo immediately in early game and also farm faster with his enhanced first skill. Do not fight immediately if ur not level 3 because U don't have that much dmg in just 2 skills.
hero.hero_weakness: In my experience his weakness is when U don't hit Ur skills U don't get that 15%+ hybrid Lifesteal and spamming his skills like a maniac. He's also vulnerable to crowd control after doing a combo.

spell.spell_desc: Ofc use retribution when Ur using jungle Julian

dominants.dominant_desc: making sure u upgrade skill 1 in begin , try to farm ur 2-3 waves from the bushes and if possible , poke enemy mm. hero.hero_overview: Julian is a Fighter/Mage hero with a unique playstyle that relies on skill combinations instead of a traditional ultimate. He deals high magic burst damage, has great mobility, and excels in both Mid Lane and Jungle. Mastering skill order and timing is essential to fully unlock his potential.
hero.hero_strength:
High burst magic damage, especially in mid game
Flexible skill combinations for different situations
Strong mobility and hard to catch
Excellent in 1v1 duels
Very effective in team fights when played correctly
hero.hero_weakness:
High skill requirement and difficult to master
Weak in the early game before level 3
Vulnerable to crowd control (CC)
Mistakes in skill order greatly reduce effectiveness
Highly dependent on good timing and positioning

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Khufra can stun and hold enemies in place. This lets Julian use his full combo safely and deal maximum damage.

counters.counter_desc:
Thamuz is melee and needs to stay close to deal damage.
Julian can poke from distance, burst fast with his skills, and heal with skill 2.
If Thamuz tries to fight alone, Julian can escape or keep hitting him while staying safe.

equips.equip_desc:
1. Bloody Retribution
Good choice. This helps Julian steal HP from enemies and deal more damage in fights. This is the best jungle spell for him.


2. Feather of Heaven
This item gives attack speed + magic damage per basic attack.
Important: Julian does not rely on attack speed or basic attacks. Feather of Heaven is not very good on him because he deals most damage from his skill combos, not auto attacks. So avoid Feather of Heaven.


3. Windtalker
Very bad for Julian. Windtalker is for heroes that need attack speed and crit (MM or basic attack assassin). Julian is skill-based, so Windtalker does nothing for him.


4. Holy Crystal
Very good item. Increases burst and scaling. This is perfect for Julian late game.


5. Glowing Wand
Very good. This matches his continuous magic damage. Glowing Wand burns the enemy over time and works perfectly with his Skill 2 and combos.

hero.hero_strength:
1 No ultimate cooldown. He can use his enhanced skills very often.


2. Strong combos. He can burst squishy heroes fast.


3. Strong early and mid game. He wins many 1v1s and early fights.


4. Good sustain. Enhanced Skill 2 gives spell vamp and lifesteal.


5. Good mobility. Skill 3 and Skill 2 help him chase or escape.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Weak if you miss your skill combo. Missing one skill lowers damage.


2. Struggles late game vs very tanky heroes like Uranus, Fredrinn, Barats.


3. Requires timing and skill usage. Not beginner friendly.


4. Weak to crowd control like stuns and silences.

spell.spell_desc: Battle Spell: Best spell depends on the role: Jungle: Retribution (bloody retribution is best for damage and sustain) Mid lane: Flameshot or Execute Side lane: Execute (good kill pressure)

spell.spell_desc: Vengence

cooperates.cooperate_desc: In reality, any tank that can collect all of them helps Julian in using a second combo (1-3-2), but I feel that it is the best tank that suits Julian
Florin helps Julian to hold up well in team kills with his health recovery and Florin's abilities make him invincible in team kills and will not die easily

counters.counter_desc: Mainstar is a good counter, it prevents him from using his own combos
Badang is full of control effects and will annoy Julian a lot and won't let him move easily

dominants.dominant_desc: Try not to enter into team kills first. Wait for an opportunity to enter into a second combo (1-3-2) or (1-2-3) depending on the situation. Try to kill an archer or a magician first so that you can control the fight and try to farm well

emblems.emblem_desc: Helps increase damage and restore life

equips.equip_desc: High damage, high HP recovery, high team kill endurance, attack speed

hero.hero_overview: Julian relies on Farm's speed and ability to deal high damage from the beginning of a match until the end, and he has a high healing that makes him able to withstand team kills
hero.hero_strength: He has farm speed, high life recovery, high damage, the ability to escape and enter team kills, a hero who can face 5 people alone, multi-combat from damage to crowd control and escape
hero.hero_weakness: He has to reach level 3 first to be able to do anything, one mistake in a combo could make you die, you have to have high reflexes

data.recommend: Tips and guide for the correct way to use Julian. Try it and you will not regret it
